UpdateKnowledgeBase.description: Grants permission to update a knowledge base

UpdateMarketplaceModelEndpoint.name: UpdateMarketplaceModelEndpoint
UpdateMarketplaceModelEndpoint.description: Grants permission to update a marketplace model endpoint

UpdatePrompt.name: UpdatePrompt
UpdatePrompt.description: Grants permission to update a prompt

UpdateProvisionedModelThroughput.name: UpdateProvisionedModelThroughput
UpdateProvisionedModelThroughput.description: Grants permission to update a provisioned model throughput that you created earlier

UpdateSession.name: UpdateSession
UpdateSession.description: Grants permission to update an existing session

ValidateFlowDefinition.name: ValidateFlowDefinition
ValidateFlowDefinition.description: Grants permission to validate prompt flow definitions

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by creating requests based on the allowed set of values for each of the mandatory tags

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by having actions based on the tag value associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by creating requests based on the presence of mandatory tags in the request

bedrock:BearerTokenType.description: Filters access by the Short-term or Long-term bearer tokens

bedrock:GuardrailIdentifier.description: Filters access by the GuardrailIdentifier containing the GuardrailArn or the GuardrailArn:NumericVersion

bedrock:InferenceProfileArn.description: Filters access by the specified inference profile

bedrock:InlineAgentName.description: Filters access by the Inline Agent Names, this will be used in InvokeInlineAgent API names

bedrock:PromptRouterArn.description: Filters access by the specified prompt router

bedrock:ServiceTier.description: Filters access by the specified ServiceTier

bedrock:ThirdPartyKnowledgeBaseCredentia.description: Filters access by the secretArn containing the credentials of the third party platform
